The '''''Relentless''''' was an [[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial I''-class Star Destroyer]] which was best known as part of [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn's]] fleet during his campaign against the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]].

==History==
===Galactic Civil War===
Until [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]], the ''Relentless'' was commanded by [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Ranif Parlan|Parlan]], who directed the Imperial search for [[Adar Tallon/Legends|Adar Tallon]] on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. After failing in his mission, Parlan was executed by [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]]. Soon afterwards, Captain [[Westen]] was given command of the ''Relentless'', but he met the same fate when he, too, failed Lord Vader.

[[File:Relentless2-Otherspace.jpg|thumb|left|200px|''Relentless'' in action]]

By [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], Captain [[Dorja]] was in command of the ''Relentless''. A cautious commander, Dorja commanded the vessel during the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], where the ''Relentless'' was distinguished by not sustaining any casualties. Afterwards, the ''Relentless'' retreated along with the [[Chimaera/Legends|''Chimaera'']], and remained part of the fleet faction which Thrawn would eventually command. Dorja's personal differences with the ''Chimaera''{{'s}} captain, [[Gilad Pellaeon/Legends|Gilad Pellaeon]], and Grand Admiral Thrawn relegated him to a minor role in the latter's campaign of [[9 ABY/Legends|9 ABY]]. The ''Relentless'' played a role in the [[Raid on New Cov]], where its crew attempted to capture [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]]. The ''Relentless'' also saw action during the capture of the [[Ukio system/Legends|Ukio system]] and the [[Battle of Bilbringi (9 ABY)|Battle of Bilbringi]].

The ''Relentless'', still under Dorja's command, eventually entered the service of the [[Imperial Remnant]]'s [[Braxant Sector Fleet]], taking orders from [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Vilim Disra]] and Pellaeon (now a [[Fleet Admiral/Legends|Fleet Admiral]]). In [[19 ABY/Legends|19 ABY]], the ''Relentless'' was sent by Disra to [[Mission to Morishim|intercept]] a [[CR90 corvette/Legends|Corellian corvette]] near [[Morishim]]. This corvette carried [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Meizh Vermel]], a courier sent by Pellaeon to enter peace negotiations with the New Republic. Later that year, the ''Relentless'' was at the [[Battle of Yaga Minor (Galactic Civil War)|Battle of Yaga Minor]], carrying the Remnant's ruling triumvirate (Moff Disra, [[Major/Legends|Major]] [[Grodin Tierce]], and the Thrawn impersonator [[Flim (Human)|Flim]]).

===Yuuzhan Vong War===
In [[28 ABY/Legends|28 ABY]], following the Imperial Starfleet's retreat from the [[Battle of Bastion]] and the withdrawal at Yaga Minor, the ''Relentless'' led [[Fleet Group Relentless|Fleet Group ''Relentless'']], one of four temporary battlegroups created for the [[Battle of Borosk (Yuuzhan Vong War)|defense of Borosk]] against the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] invaders. Following the battle, the ''Relentless'' was among the Star Destroyers ordered deployed from Borosk to assist in the [[Battle of Yaga Minor (Yuuzhan Vong War)|defense of Yaga Minor]]. Following Yaga Minor, the ''Relentless'' accompanied the ''[[Right to Rule]]'' on its hunt of the remaining forces of [[B'shith Vorrik]] to [[Generis/Legends|Generis]] and then [[Esfandia/Legends|Esfandia]] where it participated in the [[Battle of Esfandia]].
